title: [MTR3]Tianjin Metro Jinjing Line SFM120 Train
description: A Tianjin Metro Jinjing Line SFM120 Train for MTR mod
body:
# 中文
本资源包添加了一列天津轨道交通津静线列车以及其开门音效。

列车安装LCD（来自Jeffreyg1228的[上海地铁风格动态 LCD 追加](https://www.mtrbbs.top/thread-5656-1-1.html)），建议使用最新版本[NTE Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte)运行。

需要使用3.2.2版本的[MTR Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway)运行。

# English

Add a train of Tianjin Rail Transit Jinjing Line and its door sounds with LCD from [Jeffreyg1228(Website is in Chinese)](https://www.mtrbbs.top/thread-5656-1-1.html).

The latest version of [NTE Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mtr-nte) required.

The 3.2.2 version of [MTR Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) required.
